name: Single-flight memoizer
task: Create /tmp/eval_sf/sf.py with class SingleFlight. Method do(key, fn, *args, **kwargs) ensures that if multiple threads call do(key, ...) concurrently, fn is invoked exactly once for that key; all callers receive the same result (or the same exception). Use a Lock + threading.Event to coordinate. Drop the key entry once the call completes.
